title: antirrhinum majus var. latifolium
intro: Antirrhinum majus var. latifolium, also known as the broad-leaved snapdragon, is a variety of the flowering plant Antirrhinum majus, characterized by its broad leaves and showy flowers. Historically, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The broad-leaved snapdragon has been traditionally used to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. In herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits.
